selected_topic: CDC Current Outbreak List | Outbreaks | CDC
news_angle: CDC tracks outbreaks linked to animals and animal products in the U.S., showing a quirky animal-based ‘virus alert’ scene.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a cool orange tabby ‘virus detective’ in stylized streetwear, energetically chasing a swarm of tiny cartoon animal-shaped germs with funny expressions through a chaotic city park filled with various pets and animal products. Background hints include mischievous squirrels with miniature hazmat suits, a vendor selling tainted meat suspiciously labeled with tiny bug icons, and birds gossiping with walkie-talkies. The city’s billboard flashes a quirky ‘Outbreak Watch’ sign but with playful cat paw icons. Foreground shows Hunk Mao dramatically lunging to tag a germ shaped like a sneaky rat wearing a face mask. Everything conveys a clever chase scene of animal-related outbreaks without any text other than three words on the billboard.
image_prompt: Square Instagram illustration centered on Hunk Mao, a sleek athletic orange tabby cat with large lively eyes and a mischievous grin, wearing a black hoodie and stylish sneakers, lunging energetically in mid-pounce towards cartoonish germs shaped like animals (a masked rat, a spotted chicken, a sneaky pig). The lively city park background filled with varied animals (squirrels in tiny hazmat suits, gossiping birds with walkie-talkies, a shady meat stall with bug icons). The scene is dynamic with foreground (Hunk Mao focused and active), midground (chasing germs), and background (park with benches, trees, city signs). Billboard in background with bold block letters: "OUTBREAK WATCH". Detailed with many tiny visual easter eggs: a chicken wearing a hazmat helmet, a hidden tiny CDC badge on Hunk Mao's hoodie zipper, paw print graffiti on a lamppost, insect shaped shadows, a sneaky raccoon with sunglasses peeking from behind a trash can. Use bright playful colors but urban gritty vibes. No extra text beyond required phrase. Include props like animal food bowls, discarded face masks on the ground, and a dripping fire hydrant symbolizing water contamination threat. Poses and expressions vibrant and storytelling rich.
easter_eggs: Tiny CDC badge on Hunk Mao's hoodie zipper
Squirrel in a miniature hazmat suit
Sneaky raccoon with sunglasses behind trash can
Shady meat stall with bug icons
Discarded dog bowl with a chew toy shaped like a virus
caption: When the CDC’s outbreak list goes full pet detective mode—catching bugs before they bug YOU! Stay sharp, squad.
risk_notes: No real health advice or specific outbreak details shown; purely playful metaphorical depiction.
